text: There is a sense of anticipation here, as if I am about to partake in something both structured and novel. The clean lines, the organized spaces, and the emphasis on research and development evoke hope for discovery, but also a certain detachment—the kind born from environments designed for contemplation more than conversation. I feel both curiosity and a slight unease, aware that I stand on the threshold of new ideas, surrounded by reminders of the evolving relationship between humans and intelligent machines.
